payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify the specific memory you want considered.
repair_options: Clarify what “the thing” refers to with the exact detail to remember.
Provide the date or context for “yesterday” so the relevant item can be identified.
If this is a new fact, state it explicitly so it can be evaluated as a separate memory candidate.
If it refers to an existing memory, provide enough identifying information to choose whether to keep both, update, or ignore.
